lede: A look at February 7 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Diego Aguado and Morris Claiborne, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: Happisburgh footprints
events.desc: Scientists announce that the Happisburgh footprints in Norfolk, England, date back to more than 800,000 years ago, making them the oldest known hominid footprints outside Africa.

events.title: Abdullah II of Jordan
events.desc: Crown Prince Abdullah becomes the King of Jordan on the death of his father, King Hussein.

events.title: Ramzi Yousef
events.desc: Ramzi Yousef, the mastermind of the 1993 World Trade Center bombing, is arrested in Islamabad, Pakistan.

events.title: Maastricht Treaty
events.desc: The Maastricht Treaty is signed, leading to the creation of the European Union.

events.title: The Troubles
events.desc: The Troubles: The Provisional IRA launches a mortar attack on 10 Downing Street in London, the headquarters of the British government.

events.title: World War II
events.desc: World War II: Imperial Japanese Navy forces complete the evacuation of Imperial Japanese Army troops from Guadalcanal during Operation Ke, ending Japanese attempts to retake the island from Allied forces in the Guadalcanal campaign.

events.title: Walt Disney
events.desc: The second full-length animated Walt Disney film, Pinocchio, premieres.

events.title: Second Boer War
events.desc: Second Boer War: British troops fail in their third attempt to lift the Siege of Ladysmith.

events.title: Bubonic plague
events.desc: A Chinese immigrant in San Francisco falls ill to bubonic plague in the first plague epidemic in the continental United States.

events.title: Napoleonic Wars
events.desc: Napoleonic Wars: Napoleon finds Bennigsen's Russian forces taking a stand at Eylau. After bitter fighting, the French take the town, but the Russians resume the battle the next day.

deaths.text: Alan Perlis, American computer scientist and academic

observances.text: Christian feast day: Blessed Pope Pius IX
Christian feast day: Egidio Maria of Saint Joseph
